channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: SK Hynix opens at $170 on Nasdaq. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'
item.description: SK Hynix has soared to a trillion-dollar market cap by serving some of the biggest names in technology, including Nvidia and Apple.

item.title: Trump says he won't sign housing bill, which would become law automatically
item.description: Congress passed the bill that aims to address the costs of homes and rein in institutional investors with strong bipartisan support in June.

item.title: Stablecoin issuer Circle just got the greenlight to operate as a bank. The shares are up 5%
item.description: Stablecoin issuer Circle surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted it approval to operate as a trust bank.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: SK Hynix, Meta, WD-40, Delta, Vodafone & more
item.description: These are some of the stocks posting the largest moves midday.

item.title: S&P 500 rises as index heads for winning week: Live updates
item.description: Wall Street is coming off a winning day, following a jump in chipmakers and falling oil prices.

item.title: Senate Democrats want hearings on Trump’s crypto holdings and foreign investors
item.description: Democratic Senators cited $1.4 billion in Trump family crypto income, unidentified investors, and a reported UAE-backed stake in World Liberty Financial.

item.title: Trump purges Election Assistance Commission members, months before midterms
item.description: The White House said the Supreme Court's ruling allowing President Trump to fire FTC Commissioner Louise Slaughter provided the precedent for the removals.

item.title: These stocks reporting next week have a history of topping analysts' expectations
item.description: Earnings season is about to begin, and a slate of companies set to report have a track record of surpassing expectations.

item.title: Elon Musk postpones first TV interview since SpaceX went public
item.description: Elon Musk's space and AI company SpaceX began trading on June 12 in a historic IPO that raised $85.7 billion.

item.title: Air taxi company Beta wraps first test flights in U.S. government's pilot program
item.description: Beta is one of several electric air taxi makers racing to secure Federal Aviation Administration certification and start flying passengers commercially.

item.title: These are America's 10 most expensive states for 2026, where inflation is punishing residents
item.description: These 10 U.S. states are the most expensive places to live in America in 2026, with inflation punishing residents to an extreme degree.

item.title: These are America's 10 cheapest states for 2026, where you can still beat inflation
item.description: These are America's cheapest states to live in for 2026, where residents can still beat inflation.

item.title: Trump says U.S. to continue talks with Iran despite scrapped ceasefire
item.description: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.

item.title: How the U.S.-Iran deal set the stage for renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. and Iran's contradictory interperations of the memorandum of understanding have led to renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Meta's stock heads for best week since early 2024 as optimism builds around AI strategy
item.description: Meta released two AI models this week as part of its new Muse Spark family, under the leadership of Alexandr Wang.

item.title: Kraken is rebuilding its app around agentic trading as crypto exchanges evolve beyond crypto
item.description: Kraken is rebuilding its app around agentic trading, the company told CNBC exclusively.

item.title: Bet on human intelligence over AI with this stock, says top tech analyst
item.description: Reddit's trove of human-generated posts is likely to become a bigger draw for internet users amid an explosion in AI content, per Needham.

item.title: Delta expects higher airfare to last, bringing 2026 profit goal in reach, CEO says
item.description: Delta is the first of the U.S. airlines to report second-quarter results.

item.title: Meta found to breach EU laws with 'addictive' Instagram, Facebook designs
item.description: Instagram and Facebook's "addictive" designs have put Meta in breach of the European Union's digital laws, the EU concluded Friday in a preliminary report.

item.title: America's Top States for Business 2026: See the full rankings and where your state finished
item.description: CNBC's annual study puts all 50 states to the test across 138 metrics and 10 categories of competitiveness. These are America's Top States for Business.

item.title: We're looking to buy more of this chip stock as the once-hot group cools
item.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

item.title: The best way to pay off debt is situational. Use this flowchart to find the right tools for you
item.description: Follow this chart to see whether a credit counselor, a debt relief company, or a DIY approach is right for you.

item.title: Private chef salaries reach $300,000 as the rich seek their own Michelin stars
item.description: Demand for chefs, personal assistants, butlers, nannies, housekeepers, chauffeurs and estate managers have reached records, according to Morgan & Mallet.

item.title: OpenAI exec Fidji Simo says she's stepping down due to chronic illness, will transition to advisor
item.description: Fidji Simo stepped away from OpenAI in April for a medical leave, says she now has to focus on recovery.

item.title: Inside NATO's extraordinary 48 hours that revealed Trump's grip on global diplomacy
item.description: Steve Sedgwick goes behind the scenes of NATO's dramatic 48 hours, where Trump's changing tone reshaped diplomacy and left allies guessing.

item.title: AI, data center fears could be key in closely watched Michigan Democratic Senate primary
item.description: Abdul El-Sayed and Rep. Haley Stevens will face off in the Michigan Democratic Senate primary on Aug. 4.

item.title: 48-year-old worked at a garden center for $17/hour to make ends meet: 'It's one of the best jobs I've ever had'
item.description: "Without a job, I felt invisible. With a job, I felt seen, useful, and purposeful again," says Leslie Friday, who sold plants and flowers while job searching after a layoff. "I loved every minute."

item.title: Why the stock market and economy may seem out of sync
item.description: The stock market has boomed on AI euphoria, while the trajectory of the U.S. economy has been more tepid, economists said.

item.title: New Fed task force members share Chairman Kevin Warsh's embrace of AI
item.description: The three members of a task force advising the Fed on artificial intelligence are strong proponents of the technology.

item.title: The Tech Download: Teen social media bans miss a key part of the puzzle: AI chatbots
item.description: Teenagers are increasingly becoming dependent on AI chatbots, echoing a familiar problem with social media in the 2010s.
